title: Adventure #2
rules: Rules will be shown when needed directly inside the puzzle grid

middle.text: "It looks like i need to surround these shapes a certain number of times" (Learned rule #4)
"These circles looks dangerous to step on, better avoid them" (Learned rule #3)
"I can't pass through these invisible walls" (Learned rule #6)

top.text: Learned rules: (more rules will show up here when you reveal puzzles)

middle.text: 1. The path may never touch itself (for example, no 2×2 block of path cells), and it may

bottom.text: never branch or split (for example, no “T” intersections).

middle.text: "It seems like we shouldn't turn around these filled circles" (Learned rule #7)
2. The path must pass through every arrow in the direction it points (always 2 cells).

top.text: 3. The path may not pass through any empty (white) circle.

bottom.text: 4. Each polygon must be surrounded by the path a number of times equal to its number of

top.text: vertices (triangle: 3 out of 8 possible cells around it must be path colored).

bottom.text: 5. In any region containing a small central dot, the path must have
6. The path must enter a dashed-wall cell toward the dashed wall and

top.text: exit in a perpendicular direction, without crossing the wall.

bottom.text: 7. The path must pass through every filled circle, but it may neither

top.text: turn on the circle nor in any adjacent cell.
A sign says "Broken bridge ahead, use

middle.text: "I can't even see the end from here"
